Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Transcendent Ruins]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — The Transcendent Ruins were built by masters ancient beyond memory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — The Transcendent Ruins is the location of the Five Factions Alliance encampment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — The Transcendent Ruins draws vital aura from hundreds of miles around.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Transcendent Ruins has at least four floors near its entrance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — The Transcendent Ruins are a dark and deadly labyrinth left by ancient powerhouses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Jai Long is a leader of a party that reached the summit of the Transcendent Ruins.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — The Soulsmith foundry is located at the top of the Transcendent Ruins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — People came to the Transcendent Ruins to pull profit from danger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — The Transcendent Ruins is a location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon and Yerin encountered the Transcendent Ruins.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Lindon was previously sealed in the Transcendent Ruins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — The Transcendent Ruins is a location Lindon visited a year ago.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Two of the dream tablets were taken from the Transcendent Ruins.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — The emergence of the Transcendent Ruins led to a temporary alliance of five factions.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — The Transcendent Ruins are located in the Desolate Wilds.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
